# crusoe_kubeconfig (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "crusoe_kubeconfig" "example" {
  cluster_id = "my-cluster-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) ID of the Kubernetes cluster.

### Optional

- `auth_type` (String) Authentication type for fetching kubeconfig. Possible values: `admin_cert`, `oidc`. If unset, defaults to `admin_cert`.
- `project_id` (String) ID of the project the Kubernetes cluster belongs to. If not specified, the project ID will be inferred from the Crusoe configuration.

### Read-Only

- `client_certificate` (String) User's Client certificate for authenticating to the cluster.
- `client_key` (String, Sensitive) The private key associated with the user's Client certificate.
- `cluster_address` (String) Address of the Kubernetes cluster to authenticate to.
- `cluster_ca_certificate` (String) CA Certificate of the Kubernetes cluster to authenticate to.
- `cluster_name` (String) Name of the Kubernetes cluster to authenticate to.
- `kubeconfig_yaml` (String, Sensitive) Kubeconfig of the Kubernetes cluster to authenticate to.
- `username` (String) Name of the authenticating user.
